name: Low Fat Pumpkin Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box Betty Crocker Light Yellow Cake mix, (1 lb 2.25 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cake ingredients for 2 minutes.
2. Pour the batter into a bundt pan coated with cooking spray.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely.
5. For the glaze, mix together powdered sugar and vanilla in a bowl.
6. Gradually add water, one tablespoon at a time, until the desired consistency is reached.
7. Drizzle the glaze over the warm cake.
Per serving (from 16 servings):
192 Kcal 2g fat (1g sat fat) 9% CFF 228mg Na 1mg cholesterol
(2.5g PRO/2.0g FAT/40.7g CHO)
If made in 12 mini-bundt pans:
Per serving: 256 Kcal 3g fat (1g sat fat) 9% CFF 304mg Na 2mg cholesterol
(3.3g PRO/2.7g FAT/54.2g CHO)
